message:
chore: regenerate CBOR test vectors and reformat manifest golden tests

- Regenerate enrollment request_vectors.cbor with new key IDs
  (key material changed, same structure)
- Regenerate simulate request_vectors.cbor with new request UUIDs
- Reformat ConnectorManifest::parse_str() calls in
  manifest_golden_vectors.rs to satisfy line-length lint

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
